name: api-warehouse
description: Point a coding agent at any API's docs -> client-ready assessment, sample data, and raw data landed in your warehouse. Secure, validated, raw-landing only.

interface.shortDescription: Any API's docs -> assessment, sample data, and raw data landed in your warehouse.
interface.longDescription: api-warehouse reads any API's documentation and produces a client-ready assessment, sample data, a raw-landing dlt pipeline into your warehouse (BigQuery/Snowflake/Postgres/Azure/DuckDB/files), a control-total validation report, and a deploy-ready bundle. Raw landing only; secrets stay in your environment.
defaultPrompt: Ingest this API into my warehouse: <paste API docs URL>
Assess this API's docs and give me a client-ready report
Land the posts endpoint into DuckDB and validate the load
